mainquest_rumors.text_template: An old miner slams his mug down and whispers about a crumbling stone entrance he found hidden deep within the local {biome}. He swears he heard chanting coming from inside.

A panicked merchant warns you that a mercenary group has established a toll checkpoint on the road just a few travel units {direction} of here. They are shaking down anyone without a faction passport.
A local hunter warns that livestock have been disappearing from the outskirts. She tracked massive, clawed footprints heading straight toward a dark cave system in the nearby {biome}.
A traveling scholar shares a passage from an ancient text. It claims a weapon of immense power was lost centuries ago in a ruin located directly {direction} of this settlement.

wrath_of_nahk_rumors.text_template: A frightened farmer slams his mug down. He swears he saw a small war-band of orc scouts setting up a camp in the {biome} just outside of town.
The local blacksmith sighs heavily. Supply lines are completely cut off because orcs have seized the deep iron mines in the nearby {biome}.
A high-ranking scout drags himself into the tavern, bleeding. He gasps that Chieftain Malkor has built a massive, heavily fortified stone stronghold {direction} of here.
